paragraphs.body: In the process of making these two videos, there were big differences. First, when I made the first video created by myself, I had to manually edit every character and background by myself, and input corresponding copywriting content, background music for every animation effect, etc., which took a lot of time and energy. Compared with the second video generated by AI, it saves me a lot of production time. I only need to provide the required requirements to the AI in text and he will help me make the video, without personally editing every animation effect and content. I also encountered some challenges in the production of videos. For example, I was not familiar with many software operation methods when I first created my own videos, such as inserting background music and special effects animation. The challenge in the second video was that the video content generated by AI did not meet my needs. It was too plain, and the background buildings had not changed, so I still needed to edit and modify it again.

The exact prompt I used to generated video 2: Generate a 1-min animated video to tell the story of two communities—the Hill District in Pittsburgh and a historic Shikumen lane in Shanghai—in the next 50 years. Both neighborhoods will be faced with the challenges of a rapidly changing world. Technology will play a critical role in the next 50 years. In the first scene, I want to focus on how autonomous electric shuttles will connect residents in the Hill District, while in the Shikumen lane, AI-driven smart homes will preserve the traditional courtyards with modern technologies. Local shops and artisans in both communities will leverage AI to produce personalized products and services. In the second scene, I want to focus on the use of sustainable energy and resources in response to climate change. The Hill District's parks will be lined with solar-powered streetlights and rain gardens to manage floods. In Shanghai's Shikumen lanes, rooftop gardens will gain popularity, along with cooling homes. In the final scene, I would like to wrap up my story by synthesizing the key changes that would take place in the next 50 years.
I think this prompt is enough detail, this allows us to generate a rich video effect content.

The advantage of using AI is that it can save me a lot of production time, but the disadvantage is that the content it produces is too limited, the content is a little boring, and the lack of people's open thinking.

Overall, I am satisfied with the quality of the video generated by AI, which is good enough in terms of the content richness of the dialogue, but it still needs to be strengthened in terms of the aesthetic effect of the animation and the background architecture and character changes. After using the AI to generate the video, I made changes to the background buildings, added some characters, and modified some dialogue on this basis, which I think is necessary, otherwise the effect of the video is too boring.
